title: 9-5 Essentials
description: All you need to get through the day!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3349245339c13b957d87292d192b8803d2bf4b2b.png)

## **I am slowly working on a large update, will likely be released after another mod I am working on, _Thumb & Thicket_!**

### **🚬About 9-5**
9-5 Essentials is a vanilla-styled (as much as possible with the given content) mod that adds quirky things I deem 'essential' to power through a 9-5. Right now, the main features include Cigarette & Coffee with plans to add Gambling & Alcohol, and much much more!.

*Want a better look at the features? Check out the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/9-5-essentials/gallery)!*

### **⚠️Important**
This mod is actively updated, so more features are to be added. I have lots of content planned, some of which you can see in [planned content](https://github.com/jolenesjolene/9-5-Essentials/wiki/Planned-Content). Also, 'Mary Jane' and other substances in this mod are entirely fictional and are in no way based off of **OR** inspired by any real-world things - bar Britney Spears.

### **☕Compatability**
9-5 Essentials is designed to work smoothly with all other mods. If ya’ll run into any compatibility issues, feel free to report them on my [discord server](https://discord.gg/YmTrvy9BmW)!

---
### **🥖Queries**
- **Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack or make videos about it?**
- **A:** Absolutely! Ya’ll are welcome to include 9-5 Essentials in your modpacks or content. Just be sure to give proper credit and don’t claim it as your own.

- **Q: Will you backport to 1.20.1 or older versions?**
- **A:** Nope, backports aren’t planned. The earliest version this mod supports is 1.21.8.

- **Q: Will you port the mod to Forge / NeoForge?**
- **A:** No
